arabicText: إِنَّمَا الأَعْمَالُ بِالنِّيَّاتِ، وَإِنَّمَا لِكُلِّ امْرِئٍ مَا نَوَى
englishTranslation: Actions are judged by intentions, and every person will have only what they intended.

arabicText: كَانَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ﷺ أَجْوَدَ النَّاسِ
englishTranslation: The Messenger of Allah, peace be upon him, was the most generous of people.
Islam is built upon five pillars.

arabicText: مَنْ يُرِدِ اللَّهُ بِهِ خَيْرًا يُفَقِّهْهُ فِي الدِّينِ
englishTranslation: When Allah intends good for someone, He gives them understanding of the religion.
